attractions.name: Adventure Aquarium
attractions.description: Major aquarium on Camden waterfront with sharks, penguins, hippos, and touch tanks

attractions.name: Cooper River Park
attractions.description: 346-acre county park with lake, walking/biking trail, rowing, picnic areas

attractions.name: Cherry Hill Mall
attractions.description: Premier South Jersey shopping destination with 160+ stores, dining, and entertainment

attractions.name: Philadelphia Museum of Art (via PATCO)
attractions.description: World-class art museum, easily accessible via PATCO train to Philly in 15 minutes
attractions.frequency: Thu-Mon 10:00-17:00, quick train ride from Cherry Hill

attractions.name: Battleship New Jersey Museum
attractions.description: WWII-era battleship permanently docked on Camden waterfront, self-guided and overnight tours

attractions.name: Pine Barrens (Wharton State Forest)
attractions.description: 1.1 million-acre pine forest, canoeing on Batsto River, hiking, cranberry bogs
attractions.frequency: Day trip, open year-round, best spring-fall

attractions.name: Haddonfield Downtown Dining
attractions.description: Charming historic town center with independent restaurants, cafés, and boutiques
attractions.frequency: Daily, walkable downtown, various restaurant hours

attractions.name: Camden Waterfront Events
attractions.description: BB&T Pavilion concerts, Wiggins Waterfront Park events, seasonal festivals on the Delaware

attractions.name: Smithville Village & Lake
attractions.description: Historic village with shops, restaurants, paddleboats on the lake, train rides
attractions.frequency: Day trip, open daily, seasonal events
